mapper.select: SELECT R.reservation_id, R.user_id, R.place_id, TRUNC(R.check_in) AS check_in, TRUNC(R.check_out) AS check_out, R.visit_time, R.guest_count, R.request_note, R.status, R.payment_id, R.created_at, P.name, P.address, P.place_type FROM RESERVATION R LEFT JOIN PLACE P ON R.place_id = P.place_id WHERE R.RESERVATION_ID = #{reservation_id}
mapper.update: UPDATE RESERVATION SET status = #{status}, check_in = #{check_in}, check_out = #{check_out}, guest_count = #{guest_count}, visit_time = #{visit_time}, request_note = #{request_note}, created_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE reservation_id = #{reservation_id}
UPDATE RESERVATION SET status = 'CANCELLED' WHERE reservation_id = #{reservation_id} AND status != 'CANCELLED'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(CASE WHEN TRUNC(created_at) = TRUNC(sysdate) THEN 1 END) AS today, COUNT(CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(created_at, 'yyyy-MM') = TO_CHAR(sysdate, 'yyyy-MM') THEN 1 END) AS monthly, ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 END)*100 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS cancel_rate FROM RESERVATION
SELECT TO_CHAR(created_at, 'yyyy-MM') AS month, count(*) AS cnt FROM RESERVATION WHERE created_at >= ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -6) GROUP BY TO_CHAR(created_at, 'yyyy-MM') ORDER BY month
SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM RESERVATION GROUP BY status
SELECT NVL(P.place_type, '미분류') AS place_type, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM RESERVATION R LEFT JOIN PLACE P ON R.place_id = P.place_id GROUP BY P.place_type

SELECT TO_CHAR(created_at, 'D') AS day_num, TO_CHAR(created_at, 'DY', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=KOREAN') AS day_name, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM RESERVATION GROUP BY TO_CHAR(created_at, 'D'), TO_CHAR(created_at, 'DY', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=KOREAN') ORDER BY day_num

SELECT R.reservation_id, R.user_id, R.created_at, TRUNC(R.check_in) AS check_in, P.name, P.place_type FROM RESERVATION R LEFT JOIN PLACE P ON R.place_id = P.place_id WHERE R.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY R.created_at DESC

SELECT * FROM( SELECT R.reservation_id, R.user_id, R.created_at, TRUNC(R.check_in) AS check_in, R.status, P.name, P.place_type FROM RESERVATION R LEFT JOIN PLACE P ON R.place_id = P.place_id ORDER BY R.created_at DESC )
WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM RESERVATION WHERE status = 'PENDING'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, A.* FROM ( SELECT R.reservation_id, R.user_id, R.created_at, TRUNC(R.check_in) AS check_in, P.name, P.place_type FROM RESERVATION R LEFT JOIN PLACE P ON R.place_id = P.place_id WHERE R.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY R.created_at DESC ) A ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}
